question: Which player won the Golden Ball (best player) at the 2014 FIFA World Cup despite his team finishing as runners-up?

answer: Stephen Curry (2015, 2016 with Golden State Warriors) or Karl-Anthony Towns (2024, 2025 with Minnesota Timberwolves)
